Introduction
    The Butch Factor is a movie starring Christopher Hines, Jason Hefley, and H.T. Bennett. A multicultural examination of modern gay male society and how masculinity is expected, defined, accepted, and expanded.

details.Filming Locations: San Francisco County Jail, 850 Bryant Street, San Francisco, California, USA
